release_notes: Fasting: Ramadan prayer-time auto-fill, 'Now' buttons, Day X/Y display for multi-day fasts, fast-complete notifications
Sleep: edit existing entries, sleep arc auto-hides when unused, Progress sleep chart with hour axis
New: Health Connect sync (steps + sleep from Google Fit/Samsung Health/wearables)
New: custom daily reset time (calorie/water/exercise/sleep tracking rolls over whenever you choose, not just midnight)
Food: AI import now supports typed descriptions (not just photos), ~30 new foods, no pork/alcohol
Various UI fixes: calorie ring layout, health warning persistence, greeting time-of-day bug
